GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [value@1 DESC]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      NestedLoopJoinExec: join_type=Inner, filter=CAST(sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty)@0 AS Decimal128(38, 15)) > sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty) * Float64(0.000002)@1, projection=[ps_partkey@1, sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty)@2]

          GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty)]
